title: Trees, Traversals, and Binary Search Trees · Mastery Check
summary: Index hierarchical records and ordered keys with explicit structural invariants. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a traversable search tree with validity checks. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish root, edge, parent, child, ancestor, depth, height, leaf, and subtree.
Implement preorder, inorder, postorder, and level-order traversal iteratively and recursively.
Preserve a documented duplicate policy and global ordering invariant during updates.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
